title: Discord Screenshot Sender
description: Allows you to easily send screenshots directly to your Discord channel.
body:
# Discord Screenshot Sender

Discord Screenshot Sender allows you to easily send screenshots directly to your Discord channel. This mod streamlines the process of capturing and sharing your in-game moments with friends or the community.

## Features
- **Screenshot Sharing**: Quickly take screenshots and send them to your specified Discord channel.
- **Customizable Discord Token**: Easily input your Discord webhook token for seamless integration.
- **Configurable Settings**: Adjust settings such as whether to delete screenshots after sending.
- **User-Friendly Interface**: Simple configuration menu accessible in-game.

## Usage
1. Press in game F2!
2. Look to your channel in Discord

![Result in Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a53eb3366641bdaef773c56dc72061a9ff6abbf_0.webp)

## GUIDE
### **FIRST METHOD**
![guide1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10b5223fa713521e63d42066c86f9225213d5a3a.png)
![guide2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ddf4fa4f4801f1def4ff572e88dae49fdd13ceca.png)
**THEN CLICK SAVE AND QUIT AND YOU'RE DONE!**

### **SECOND METHOD**
![guide3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b192f46664d64e57229bacd431a70f854e6dbb92.png)

## Dependencies
- [Fabric API](https://fabricmc.net/use/)
- [Cloth Config API](https://github.com/shedaniel/cloth-config)
- [Mod Menu](https://github.com/TerraformersMC/ModMenu)
